# Fees and Payouts

This policy describes the fees ShopEase charges sellers and how and when you receive your earnings.

## Referral (Commission) Fees

- ShopEase charges a referral fee on each sale, calculated as a percentage of the item price (excluding shipping where applicable).
- Referral fee rates vary by category. The applicable rate for each product is shown in your seller dashboard before you list it.
- Referral fees are deducted automatically from the sale proceeds.

## Other Possible Fees

- Optional promotional or featured-placement services, if you opt in.
- Chargeback or dispute handling fees where a transaction is reversed due to seller fault.
- No monthly subscription fee applies to the standard seller plan.

## Payout Schedule

- Earnings for completed, non-disputed orders are added to your available balance.
- Payouts are disbursed to your verified bank account on a regular settlement cycle (typically every 7 days).
- A new-seller reserve may temporarily hold a portion of funds to cover potential refunds or chargebacks.

## Refunds and Adjustments

- When you refund a customer, the referral fee for that item is credited back, minus any non-refundable processing fee.
- Negative balances (for example from refunds exceeding recent sales) are carried forward and recovered from future earnings.

## Statements

- A detailed statement of sales, fees, refunds, and payouts is available in your seller dashboard for every settlement period.
